THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCKEY, GARY PLANT DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACKAY, JOHN SHARNA'S $380.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.00, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SHARNA'S. UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO SHARNA'S. PLFT ELECTS TO PROCEED AS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TO MACKAY, THE DEFT WHO IS TIMELY SERVED.
